creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 189978
Patch to update math/ess to 17.11

This patch should update math/ess from version 16.04 to 17.11. It skips version 16.10 and contains several improvements, new features and bugfixes[1].

Tested on Poudriere (10.4i/a, 11.1a, HEADa), 'portlint -AC' seems happy.


[1] https://ess.r-project.org/Manual/news.html
